description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:stable image with a docker:dind service, set DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_HOST variables and define CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE and CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE variables. Define two stages: build and release. In the build stage add a build job that inherits a before_script running docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, then executes docker build --pull -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE . and docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE. In the release stage add a release-image job that only runs on the master branch, inherits the same before_script, and runs docker pull $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, docker tag $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and docker push $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE.
